name: Van Der Linde Sovereign Tourbillon
description: A flagship gold-accent mechanical piece with skeleton dial craftsmanship and premium sapphire durability for formal occasions.

name: Van Der Linde Nocturne Chronograph
description: A deep black chronograph with brass details, tachymeter bezel, and precision movement engineered for executive styling.

name: Van Der Linde Velocity Pro
description: A sport-focused model with shock resistance, water protection, and high-contrast lume for active lifestyles.

name: Van Der Linde Heritage Slim
description: A timeless minimalist case with Roman markers and refined leather strap inspired by mid-century watchmaking.

name: Van Der Linde Imperial Date
description: Classic dress aesthetics with date aperture, polished case architecture, and balanced proportions for daily elegance.

name: Van Der Linde Pulse Connected
description: A smart hybrid watch with health tracking, message sync, and multi-day battery presented in premium materials.
